_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Ability to operate the tools to enumerate a system
reference_document_element_description: Ability to select appropriate technical tools, languages, and platforms for data and AI requirements, evaluating trade-offs between performance, maintainability, team capability, ecosystem maturity, and cost.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI TF domain. TF-A-001 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: RM-T-004 (RM, cosine: 0.402), OP-T-010 (OP, cosine: 0.394).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 3.5/10 (raw 0.347). Shared vocabulary: [ability, tools]. DCWF-only terms [enumerate, operate, system] vs WIDAI-only terms [ai, appropriate, capability, cost, data, ecosystem] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.870 (P=0.897, R=0.845). P exceeds R by 0.052 — the DCWF element's 9 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 25 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.8%). "Ability to operate the tools to enumerate a system" and "Ability to select appropriate technical tools, languages, and platforms for data" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.441 > STS 0.347 (gap +0.094). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [ability, tools] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 10.3%. Shared tokens: [ability, tools]. DCWF-only: [enumerate, operate, system]. WIDAI-only: [ai, appropriate, capability, cost, data, ecosystem].
